tags.description: On September 2009 there was no snow and really few crevasse to cross. The snow was enough to fix a tend just in the lasts 5 km.
Passable by foot without problem on September 2009. There was no snow at all in this area.
Very difficult to cross the river Tungà in this point. Walk on the moraine to detect an ice bridge
